title: AstroCraft: Intergalactic
description: AstroCraft: Intergalactic is a new, Mekanism-focused modpack about going to Space!
body:
![AstroCraft: Intergalactic logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be4d78bfc5949ebdc9dddd5c839e194279ae9fa3.png)
# AstroCraft: Intergalactic

![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/astrocraft-intergalactic?style=for-the-badge)
![Modrinth Followers](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/followers/astrocraft-intergalactic?style=for-the-badge)
![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/astrocraft-intergalactic?style=for-the-badge)

Welcome to **AstroCraft: Intergalactic**, an all-new modpack about engineering and space travel 🚀

Use your ⚙ *Mekanism* skills to craft machinery and work your way up to building the most advanced rockets in the galaxy!  
Then, use that rocket to travel to a whole 🌌 *other galaxy*!

You can also build top-tier storage systems with **Refined Storage**, with recipes fully integrated with Mekanism to make the whole pack feel cohesive.

# Features

- Questline using FTB Quests
- Mekanism for most tech
- Ad Astra for space stuff
- Refined Storage for, well, storage
- Other QOL mods

The pack features KubeJS and adds custom items and recipes to connect the mods and balance the progression. With that said, the pack isn't particularly long, and you can still play further after completing the main questline.

# Important notes

Ensure that you install FTB Quests, FTB Library, and FTB Teams before playing this pack. A window will pop up on first launch which will direct you to the downloads for these mods.

# Feedback
![Gitea Issues](https://img.shields.io/gitea/issues/open/StikyPiston/AstroCraft-Intergalactic_IssueTracker?gitea_url=https%3A%2F%2Fcodeberg.org&style=for-the-badge)

This pack will be updated according to *your* feedback

If you have any issues with the pack, or just want to suggest a new mod or feature, create an issue on [this repo](https://codeberg.org/StikyPiston/AstroCraft-Intergalactic_IssueTracker/issues), and I'll have a look!

Have fun!
> StikyPiston2483
